text: Hi Vijay, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?
Yes, it is a good time. I want to know what we spoke about.
NOTICE: This conversation has just begun. We haven't discussed anything yet. What would you like to talk about? The XOptimus Smart Charger?
Well, I want to know the price.
The price of our XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter) is ₹1499. Would you like me to send the details to WhatsApp for further information?
I cannot provide information on the XOptimus Smart Charger for ₹1499. Can I help you with something else?
It is too expensive. It is too expensive to say
Affordability isn't just about the numbers; it's about what matters most to you.
